findings.title: Decoded data flows into code execution
findings.detail: out/server/index.js decodes base64 and appears to execute it — a classic obfuscated-payload pattern.

findings.title: Spawns child processes
findings.detail: Spawns child processes in out/services/ls-discovery.js. Confirm this is disclosed by the server's tool descriptions.

findings.title: Dynamic code evaluation (eval/Function)
findings.detail: Dynamic code evaluation (eval/Function) in out/test/scriptValidity.test.js. Confirm this is disclosed by the server's tool descriptions.
